Video.summary: Survey the issues you'll consider and the scholars whose theories serve as gateways to exploration.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Image.alt: Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Video.summary: Grasp the diverse assortment of religious practices in an empire that ranged from Britain to Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Image.alt: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Learn how Rome's first emperor, Augustus, established an institution to venerate an emperor's spirit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Roman Imperial Cult

Video.summary: Examine cults and the question of whether they formed a bridge between paganism and Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Mystery Cults

Video.summary: Explore English history from the fall of the Roman Empire to the Tudor dynasty.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: From Britannia to Britain

Video.summary: Examine evidence as to whether an unidentified champion could have been King Arthur.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur

Image.alt: Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur
Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur
Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur

Video.summary: See how the victories of a shadowy figure offered only temporary stability.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Early Anglo-Saxon Kingdoms

Video.summary: Follow the story of the conversion of the Anglo-Saxons to Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Conversion of the Anglo-Saxons

Video.summary: Plunge into the substance of daily life for Anglo-Saxons of all social levels.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England

Image.alt: Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England
Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England
Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England

Video.summary: Watch as the one- or two-boat raids grew into vast armies of 50 ships or more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Viking Invasions

Video.summary: Explore the career of Alfred the Great, who kept Wessex free of Viking control.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Alfred the Great

Video.summary: Grasp how the Anglo-Saxon state became perhaps the most successful in Christian Europe.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Government of Anglo-Saxon England

Video.summary: Explore the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses II's all-but-disastrous campaign against the Hittites.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Ramesses II: Heartbeat of History

Video.summary: Professor Garland takes you into the Battle of Marathon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Marathon: The Persians Have Landed!

Video.summary: At the Theater of Dionysis, view one of the most astounding performances in history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Oresteia: Judgment at the Dionysia

Video.summary: Here, delve into the time of Pericles and the Peloponnesian War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Attack on Attica: Pericles's Gamble

Video.summary: Get a geographic overview of Eastern Europe, a region that spans 20 countries.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of Eastern Europe
Video.title: The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity

Image.alt: The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity
The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity
The Other Europe: Deep Roots of Diversity

Video.summary: Examine the many waves of people who settled Eastern Europe during the ancient and medieval worlds.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of Eastern Europe
Video.title: Formative Migrations: Mongols to Germans

Video.summary: Take a closer look at several decisive battles, including the Battle of Kosovo and the Battle of Tannenberg.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of Eastern Europe
Video.title: Clashing Golden Ages, 1389 - 1772

Video.summary: The dissolution of the combined nation of Poland and Lithuania was one of the great crimes of the modern era.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of Eastern Europe
Video.title: The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided

Image.alt: The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided
The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided
The Great Crime of Empires: Poland Divided

Video.summary: Consider the enormity of Russia's geography, desire for power, and its search for a cultural identity.
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Russia: A Cultural History
Video.title: A Russian Past, the Putin Future

Image.alt: A Russian Past, the Putin Future
A Russian Past, the Putin Future
A Russian Past, the Putin Future

Video.summary: Ivan the Terrible became a cultural and historical symbol of Russian leadership, but was he truly terrible?
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Russia: A Cultural History
Video.title: Ivan the Terrible's 500-Year Reign

Video.summary: Assess how religion changed church institutions, as well as the influence of the Russian church.
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Russia: A Cultural History
Video.title: The Russian Orthodox Church

Video.summary: Peter the Great transformed a minor power on the periphery of Europe into a formidable empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Russia: A Cultural History
Video.title: Peter the Great and a European Empire

Image.alt: Peter the Great and a European Empire
Peter the Great and a European Empire
Peter the Great and a European Empire
